function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'bar' to reach function 'main'?

dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 37:  <statement> int i; </statement> is reached, the statement line 43:  <statement> for (i = 0; i < NVARS; i++) </statement> has already been reached?
